description: Use this API routine to modify the link data of an existing two-terminal dc line in the working case (see PSSE Program Operation Manual, Area Interchange Data). Converter data for the rectifier and inverter are specified via the TWO_TERM_DC_CONVR_DATA API routine. This API routine was first introduced in release 33.0.0. ierr, realaro = two_terminal_dc_line_chng(dc, intgar, realari, meter)
python_syntax: ierr, realaro = two_terminal_dc_line_chng(dc, intgar, realari, meter)

parameters.name: dc
parameters.description: Quoted name of the two-terminal dc line for which data is to be specified; if an unquoted integer value is specified, the api converts it to a left-justified name. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: realari
parameters.description: An array of eight elements specifying values REALAR(1) through REALAR(8) as described above. (input).

parameters.name: meter
parameters.description: Metered end flag: ‘r’ or ‘i’. (input; ‘I’ by default).

return_values.name: realaro
return_values.description: An array of one elements specifying value REALAR(9) as described above. (output).

intgar.description: MDC, control mode (0, 1 or 2) (0 by default).
CCITMX, CCC Newton solution iteration limit (20 by default).

realari.description: SETVL, scheduled current (amps) or power (MW) demand (0.0 by default).
VSCHD, scheduled dc voltage (kV) (1.0 by default).
VCMOD, mode switch dc voltage (kV) (0.0 by default).
RDC, dc line resistance (0.0 by default).
DCVMIN, minimum dc voltage (kV) (0.0 by default).
CCCACC, CCC Newton solution acceleration (1.0 by default).

error_codes.description: metered end code is more than one character.
blank dc line name is invalid.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.

data error, warning and information messages; one or more of: - invalid dc line control mode - invalid dc line resistance - invalid compounding resistance - compounding resistance exceeds line resistance - scheduled voltage must exceed mode switch voltage - invalid metered end code.
